'''bothasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:swacked|swacked]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swacked|swacked]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bothasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bothasithi|bothasithi]] || [[word:bothasiji|bothasiji]] || [[word:bothasishi|bothasishi]] || [[word:bothasiki|bothasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bothasuthuthu|bothasuthuthu]] || [[word:bothasujuju|bothasujuju]] || [[word:bothasushushu|bothasushushu]] || [[word:bothasukuku|bothasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bothasuthu|bothasuthu]] || [[word:bothasuju|bothasuju]] || [[word:bothasushu|bothasushu]] || [[word:bothasuku|bothasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bothasufthuf|bothasufthuf]] || [[word:bothasufjuf|bothasufjuf]] || [[word:bothasufshuf|bothasufshuf]] || [[word:bothasufkuf|bothasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bothasethe|bothasethe]] || [[word:bothaseje|bothaseje]] || [[word:bothaseshe|bothaseshe]] || [[word:bothaseke|bothaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bothasothotho|bothasothotho]] || [[word:bothasojojo|bothasojojo]] || [[word:bothasoshosho|bothasoshosho]] || [[word:bothasokoko|bothasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bothasotho|bothasotho]] || [[word:bothasojo|bothasojo]] || [[word:bothasosho|bothasosho]] || [[word:bothasoko|bothasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bothasofthof|bothasofthof]] || [[word:bothasofjof|bothasofjof]] || [[word:bothasofshof|bothasofshof]] || [[word:bothasofkof|bothasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bothasïfthïf|bothasïfthïf]] || [[word:bothasïfjïf|bothasïfjïf]] || [[word:bothasïfshïf|bothasïfshïf]] || [[word:bothasïfkïf|bothasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bothasïfthïfthïf|bothasïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:bothasïfjïfjïf|bothasïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:bothasïfshïfshïf|bothasïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:bothasïfkïfkïf|bothasïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bothasïfthïf|bothasïfthïf]] || [[word:bothasïfjïf|bothasïfjïf]] || [[word:bothasïfshïf|bothasïfshïf]] || [[word:bothasïfkïf|bothasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bothasïfthïf|bothasïfthïf]] || [[word:bothasïfjïf|bothasïfjïf]] || [[word:bothasïfshïf|bothasïfshïf]] || [[word:bothasïfkïf|bothasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bothasæthæ|bothasæthæ]] || [[word:bothasæjæ|bothasæjæ]] || [[word:bothasæshæ|bothasæshæ]] || [[word:bothasækæ|bothasækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bothasathatha|bothasathatha]] || [[word:bothasajaja|bothasajaja]] || [[word:bothasashasha|bothasashasha]] || [[word:bothasakaka|bothasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bothasatha|bothasatha]] || [[word:bothasaja|bothasaja]] || [[word:bothasasha|bothasasha]] || [[word:bothasaka|bothasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bothasafthaf|bothasafthaf]] || [[word:bothasafjaf|bothasafjaf]] || [[word:bothasafshaf|bothasafshaf]] || [[word:bothasafkaf|bothasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bothasasha|bothasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bothashësha|bothashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bothasrosha|bothasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bothasmusha|bothasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bothasyasha|bothasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobothasnkshësha|gobothasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobothasnkrosha|gobothasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobothasnkmusha|gobothasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobothasnkyasha|gobothasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bothathasasha|bothathasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bothathashësha|bothathashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bothathasrosha|bothathasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bothathasmusha|bothathasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bothathasyasha|bothathasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobothathasnkshësha|gobothathasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobothathasnkrosha|gobothathasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobothathasnkmusha|gobothathasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobothathasnkyasha|gobothathasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bethæsasha|bethæsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bethæshësha|bethæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bethæsrosha|bethæsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bethæsmusha|bethæsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bethæsyasha|bethæsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobethæsnkshësha|gobethæsnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobethæsnkrosha|gobethæsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobethæsnkmusha|gobethæsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobethæsnkyasha|gobethæsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bothfasasha|bothfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bothfashësha|bothfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bothfasrosha|bothfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bothfasmusha|bothfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bothfasyasha|bothfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobothfasnkshësha|gobothfasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobothfasnkrosha|gobothfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobothfasnkmusha|gobothfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobothfasnkyasha|gobothfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
